name: CXyz Dark Fairy Cheer Girl
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＣＸ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオスエクシーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ダーク・フェアリー・チア・ガール
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Ekushīzu Dāku Fearī Chia Gāru
name_jp_tl: Chaos Xyz: Dark Fairy Cheer Girl
desc:
3 Level 5 monsters
When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: Draw 1 card. If this card has "Fairy Cheer Girl" as an Xyz Material, it gains this effect.
● When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and remains on the field: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each card in your hand.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 5 monsters

● When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and remains on the field: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each card in your hand.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
